title: Uragoga mucronata
taxonomy: Uragoga mucronata is classified within the family Apocynaceae, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The classification of Uragoga mucronata reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Apocynaceae family.
